name: Dimenshift
short_description: A minimalist sci-fi 2D platformer where you shift through walls and machines. Explore and find secrets in a strange, maze-like dimension, where the laws of physics don't seem to make sense.
detailed_description:
While investigating strange occurrences on a now-desolate planet, you fall through a portal that takes you to a strange place.

Welcome to "The Disparate",

a space outside of our Universe, where the physical laws don't quite seem to work right. A space where direction is meaningless.

As you try to escape this maze-like dimension, use the Dimenshift Device to "shift" through walls and evade the "Machines". Explore a strange place that doesn't quite make sense. Discover secrets, and maybe uncover the mysterious origins of this place.

What lies deeper in the Disparate?

Is it danger? Power? Fiction? Reality?

…Hope?

Features:

  • A maze of levels requiring exploration to successfully navigate. Enjoy going in circles and feeling lost and confused!
  • Unique, challenging, and puzzling platforming mechanics. Shift through walls, re-orient yourself, and pay close attention...
  • Lots of secrets, including logs left by a scientist working on a mysterious project. Might these reveal the origins of this strange place?
  • 3D auto-runner bonus levels. Can you reach the end of each of them?
  • Strange and original music emanating from this dimension, adding to the mysterious atmosphere...
